summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NextGen DMS license feature and core functionality. All backend APIs pass (14/14 tests). Frontend UI fully functional including login, license management, document operations, and checkout/checkin flow. Branding successfully changed from 'Papyrus' to 'NextGen DMS'.

issues: Upload dropzone missing data-testid attribute for automated testing

critical_code_review_comments: React useEffect dependency warnings in multiple pages (LicensePage, DocumentsPage, etc.) - not critical but should be addressed for code quality
seed_data_creation: Test documents created during backend testing (prefixed with TEST_) - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: License feature fully tested and working. Trial license generation, activation, and deactivation all functional. Branding changed to 'NextGen DMS'. Document checkout/checkin flow working. All navigation and core features operational.

license_feature.generate_trial_license: PASS - API generates valid trial license key
license_feature.activate_license: PASS - License activation works with valid key
license_feature.invalid_license_rejection: PASS - Invalid keys are rejected with 400 error
license_feature.license_status_check: PASS - Public endpoint returns license status

login_flow.login_with_valid_credentials: PASS - Login successful, redirects to dashboard
login_flow.license_check_on_login: PASS - Redirects to /license if no active license

document_operations.upload_document: PASS - Document upload works via API
document_operations.document_detail: PASS - Document detail page loads with all info
document_operations.checkout_document: PASS - Checkout works, shows 'Checked Out (You)' badge

dashboard.stats_display: PASS - Shows total documents, records, legal holds, pending dispositions

navigation.all_pages_accessible: PASS - Dashboard, Documents, Upload, Records, Legal Holds, Disposition, Audit Logs, Admin, License pages all accessible
